leadText: Poni Coast (Japanese: ポニの海岸 Poni Coast) is a location on Poni Island in Alola, located northeast of Poni Plains and southeast of Poni Gauntlet.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Poni Plains is a rocky, barren coastal area on the northeast side of Poni Island, with many smashable boulders lying around the narrow, bendy paths going across it. Despite the barren landscape, due to its location next the ocean, it is a popular view spot among both native Alolans and foreign Sightseers alike.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Contents 1 Items 1.1 Found in smashed rocks 1.2 Dropped after ambush encounters 1.3 Zygarde Cube Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Max Revive At the northern point of the ledge along the west cliff (hidden) S M US UM TM97 ( Dark Pulse ) Above a ledge northwest of the Poni Plains entrance S M US UM Comet Shard At the northwest point S M Power Bracer At the northwest point, next to Firefighter Aiden US UM Found in smashed rocks [ edit | edit source ] Sometimes, after smashing breakable rocks with Tauros Charge , items can be found in the debris.
